response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed, and two distinct musical performances were identified. For the first song, the title "KING" and the artist "Kanaria" were identified using the context of the performance. For the second song, the title "Mantra Hujan" and the artist "Kobo Kanaeru" were identified. Lyrics were searched for both songs using bilingual search queries. The scene structure was divided into the performance of KING, the narrative dialogue, and the performance of Mantra Hujan.
response.global_summary: The video consists of two musical performances by Hololive characters, separated by a dialogue scene involving a character exploring a room. The first performance features a group of characters singing "KING" by Kanaria. The second performance features Kobo Kanaeru singing her original song "Mantra Hujan".

scenes.description: Multiple Hololive characters perform a cover of the song "KING" in a concert setting.

幽閉 ストップ 知ってないし
勘弁にしといてなんて惨忍
人様願う欠片のアイロニ
だれもが願う無機質なような
一足先に始めてたいような
先が見えないヴァージンハッピーショー

YOU ARE KING YOU ARE KING
無邪気に遊ぶ 期待 期待のダーリン ダーリン
健気に笑う 痛い 痛いの消える
無様に

レフトサイド ライトサイド
歯をむき出して パッパッパッ 照れくさいね
レフトサイド ライトサイド
歯を突き出して パッパッパッ ハハ
YOU ARE KING YOU ARE KING
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Locking up the clever one before they die
You, hey, you know that it's a pain to get you to be obedient, darling
Don't lock me up! It's not like I knew
Give me a break!
You are KING, YOU ARE KING
Playing innocently, expecting darling
Laughing obediently, painful painful, fading
Clumsily, I am KING
Left side, right side
Baring teeth, pa-pa-pa
Such a nuisance, right?
Left side, right side
Thrusting out teeth, pa-pa-pa-ha-ha
You are KING, YOU ARE KING

scenes.description: Narrative scene with a character, Kaela Kovalskia, in a room, solving a puzzle.
Kobo Kanaeru performs her song "Mantra Hujan" in front of a digital screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Rapalkan mantra, kilau cahaya, sinari dunia
Sunyi dan sepi, di ruang hampa
Masalah datang dan pergi, sudah biasa
Ha~ Sendiri lagi, enggan untuk melangkah
Kubuka mata, menatap langit
Rintik hujan bergema, genangi bentala
Ha~ Seakan membisik, “Ayo jelajahi dunia!”

Walau hujan tak kunjung berhenti
Masih ada aku temanimu disini
Rapalkan mantra datangkan cahaya
Tuk sinari hari harimu
Hilangkan semua rasa ragu
Yang selimuti hati pikiran dan emosi
Rapalkan mantra datangkan cahaya
Buka lembaran yang baru
Bokobokobokobo
Kobo Kanaeru at your service!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Cast the spell, a sparkling light that illuminates the world
Serene and quiet in an empty room
Issues come and go, I'm already used to it
Sigh~ Again, this loneliness makes me unwilling to take another step
I open my eyes and look up at the sky
Raindrops echo, flooding the earth
Sigh~ As if whispering, "Let's explore the world!"

Even though the rain won't stop
Still I'm here to accompany you
Chant the mantra to bring light
To brighten up your days
Eliminate all doubts
That covers the heart, thoughts and emotions
Chant the mantra bring light
Open the sheet new
Bokobokobokobo
Kobo Kanaeru at your service!
